field_values.action_summary: The Scarecrow uses an oil-can to lubricate the Tin Woodman's jaw, restoring his ability to speak. The Woodman expresses a renewed vow to walk with extreme care to protect all living things.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-up of the oil-can being applied to the metal joints.; Medium shot of the group gathered around the Woodman.; Profile shots of the Woodman as he makes his vow.
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Volume of oil dispensed from the can.
State of Tin Woodman's jaw (stuck vs. moving).
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH006_SC004

## Production Intent
The Scarecrow performs mechanical maintenance on the Tin Woodman using an oil-can to resolve a speech impediment. The group transitions from high-stress panic regarding the Woodman's physical state to a moment of quiet resolution and renewed purpose.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion

## Required Environments
- thick_dark_forest (specifically the path with dried branches/dead leaves)

## Continuity Constraints
- Volume of oil dispensed from the can.
- State of Tin Woodman's jaw (stuck vs. moving).

## Beat List
- BT001: The Scarecrow attempts to lubricate the jaw.
- BT002: Speech is restored.
- BT003: The Woodman's vow.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
